creator: skozlov@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161661
Patch for 4.1.2

Update textproc/kibana4 to 4.1.2
Changes:
- New version contains dtrace-provider pre-compiled for Darwin. Module is deleted during the installation. Absents of it doesn't affect kibana operation because all the code referencing the module is conditional
- Bumped version and distinfo
